name: Creole Gumbo Pot
recipeIngredient: 1 can Tomatoes in tomato juice (8 oz)
8 ounces Peeled cooked medium-size shrimp, thawed if frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the stalk end from the eggplant. Cut into 1/2-inch pieces and place in a colander. Sprinkle with 2 teaspoons of salt; let stand for 30 minutes.
2. Rinse under cold water and drain well.
3. Heat olive oil in a saucepan. Add eggplant, onion, red pepper, and garlic. Fry over low heat for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Stir in paprika and chili powder and cook gently for 2 minutes.
5. Trim the stalk ends from the okra and discard. Cut the okra into quarters.
6. Add okra, corn, chicken stock, and tomatoes to the eggplant mixture. Break up the tomatoes with a spoon. Stir in rice, cover, and simmer gently for 25 minutes or until vegetables and rice are tender.
7. Add shrimp to the mixture and heat through for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Garnish with dill sprigs if desired.
Variation: Stir in 2/3 cup half-and-half just before serving.
